---
title: "08. 立体、穷竭与终端分类"
subtitle: "Solid Geometry, Exhaustion, and Terminal Classification"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 8
categories: [elements, cultural, omega]
description: "How Books XI-XIII complete the system through solids, exhaustion, and terminal classification."
---

**Books:** Book XI, XII, XIII  
**Omega Directions:** `modular tower inverse limit`, `dynamical systems`, `spectral theory`

{{< include articles/category_08_solid_geometry_exhaustion_and_terminal_classification.md >}}

---

[Back to Elements Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
